---
title: Challenge Reference
description: Shared rules, scoring definitions, and benchmark conventions used by challenge pages.
---

Reusable challenge material lives here. Individual challenge pages should stay
focused on the task, dataset, baseline, and leaderboard state, then link back to
these shared definitions when needed.

Per-challenge protocol text lives in `challenges/<challenge-id>/challenge.qmd`
and renders under [OpenDC](../challenges/). This section should only contain
definitions that multiple challenges can reuse.

## Pages

- [Challenge Rules](challenge-rules.html): shared structure, validation, and submission expectations.
- [Metrics](metrics.html): scoring definitions and rationale used by challenge pages.
